content:
Most business relationships live and die in writing. This workshop teaches you to write English emails and documents that are clear, professional, and impossible to misread, so your message lands on the first send.

## What you'll learn
- Structuring an email so the ask is obvious within the first two lines
- Choosing tone for clients, leadership, and vendors without sounding too formal or too casual
- Trimming filler and redundancy without sounding blunt or cold
- Reusable templates for requests, follow-ups, escalations, and status updates

## Who it's for
Professionals who write in English daily (emails, Slack messages, reports, proposals) and want to sound sharper and more confident.
title: Email & Written Business Communication
